rationale: Designed for truck drivers in Europe, 'Routier Facile' acts as a tactile, high-visibility command center. Dark mode reduces cabin glare during night driving, while high contrast tactical minimalism ensures critical compliance data (driving hours, breaks) is readable instantly on the road.

rules: Use tracking-tight for all large headings.
Uppercase and tracking-[0.2em] for small labels (e.g. status).
Keep text large and legible. Minimum tap targets must be 44px high.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but readable. Prioritize scanability of the compliance dashboard.
rules: Use generous padding p-4 to p-6 inside cards to separate data.
Optical alignment is critical. Ensure text aligns properly with icons.
Compliance Dashboard MUST be sticky (either top or bottom) so it's always visible.

components.cards: Flat background with 1px border (border-border), no shadows (tactical look). Slightly rounded corners (rounded-md).
components.buttons: High contrast, solid colors. Active states use compliance colors where applicable.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized with dark backgrounds and high contrast text.
components.charts_and_progress: Use thick, highly visible progress bars for tracking driving hours (max 56h/week). Apply compliance colors dynamically based on proximity to the limit.

rules: Keep animations minimal and snappy to maintain a high-performance feel.
Use instant color changes on tap/active states for clear feedback.

images.description: Trailer truck passing on road near rail guard at night.
Heavy-duty truck navigating quiet road at dusk.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='submit-daily-log').
Contrast ratio must be minimum 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
The entire UI, labels, and placeholders MUST be in French.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and 'Inter' for body.
Force dark mode by default by adding 'dark' class to the root or body, and customize Shadcn CSS variables for high contrast.
Build a sticky Compliance Dashboard component that stays visible across the application.
Implement the Daily Work Entry Form with clear segment separation (driving, rest, découcher, meal status).
Dynamically apply the Green/Orange/Red compliance colors to progress bars based on the 56h weekly limit.
Ensure the PDF export feature formats data clearly for roadside inspections.
